meta.description: Custom development for small businesses. Business apps, websites and automation.

hero.headline:
Business tools,
not patchwork.
hero.subline: Custom development for small and mid-sized businesses that want solutions built for them.

pain.label: Daily life (placeholder)
pain.title: What you still live with every day. (draft copy)

items.text: WhatsApp messages as your only client tracking.
Shared folders nobody can find anything in.
The same information typed in three times.

ai.label: Intelligence (placeholder)
ai.title: AI that works for you. (draft copy)

items.title: Business apps
items.desc: Multi-user, secure, scalable. CRM, quotes, scheduling, inventory — built to fit.

items.title: Websites
items.desc: Showcase, client portal, admin panel. Fast, secure, no hacked-together CMS.

items.title: Automation
items.desc: Excel, Outlook, business software — we connect what doesn't talk. Zero re-entry.

steps.title: Field exchange
steps.desc: We ask the right questions before writing a single line of code. We prefer starting with an on-site visit.

steps.title: Design & validation
steps.desc: We model the solution with you. Every screen validated before development.

steps.title: Iterative development
steps.desc: Deliveries every 1–2 weeks. You test and steer priorities.

members.name: Anthony Bonjour
members.quote: Network, infrastructure, dev, cybersecurity — I step in where tech makes the difference.

members.name: Kyllian Bletrix
members.quote: Code, teach, build — that's what gets me out of bed.

mockup.title:

mockup.desc: Every application is built around your business. Clear interface, reliable data, zero unnecessary training.
